query_basis: Reviewed the current official TennCare application page for live Medicaid application and local help routes.

samples.sample_name: How Do I Apply for TennCare?
samples.evidence_snippet: There are three ways you can apply for TennCare Medicaid and Medicare Savings Programs (MSP). You can apply online, over the phone, or with a paper application.

query_basis: Reviewed current official TennCare HCBS waiver and ECF CHOICES pages for live I/DD waiver evidence.

samples.evidence_snippet: Tennessee's 1915(c) waiver programs provide Home and Community Based Services (HCBS) for people with intellectual disabilities as an alternative to institutional care.
Employment and Community First CHOICES is for people of all ages who have an intellectual or developmental disability (I/DD).

query_basis: Reviewed the current official DDA intake page for live I/DD authority and regional intake routing.

samples.evidence_snippet: The Department of Disability and Aging conducts intake activities for various programs for people with intellectual and developmental disabilities.

query_basis: Reviewed the current official TEIS referral page and TEIS district-office dataset for live local Part C routing.

samples.evidence_snippet: You may make a referral to TEIS by completing our online referral form or by calling (800) 852-7157. Please be prepared to provide the child's county of residence.
The district-office dataset lists TEIS district offices including First in Johnson City, East in Knoxville, Greater Nashville in Nashville, and Memphis Delta in Memphis.

query_basis: Reviewed the current official Tennessee special-education page for IDEA Part B evidence after the inherited URL returned 404.

samples.evidence_snippet: The department promotes educational services and programs for all Tennessee's students with special education needs.

query_basis: Reviewed the current official Tennessee School Directory page and its built-in district schema fields.

samples.evidence_snippet: The Tennessee School Directory is the online hub for information about the state's K-12 districts and schools and offers an Excel download of Tennessee schools, districts, and regions.

query_basis: Reviewed the current official Tennessee VR office locator, VR services page, and Pre-ETS page.

samples.evidence_snippet: The official office locator covers Vocational Rehabilitation Regional Offices, Community Tennessee Rehabilitation Centers, and Tennessee Technology Access Centers and preserves a live OneDHS vocational rehabilitation referral route.

The Tennessee Department of Human Services Division of Rehabilitation Services works collaboratively with local education agencies and preserves the five required Pre-Employment Transition Services under WIOA.

query_basis: Reviewed the current first-party Disability Rights Tennessee homepage for live statewide P&A evidence.

samples.evidence_snippet: Disability Rights Tennessee (DRT) is the Protection and Advocacy (P&A) agency in Tennessee, providing free services and resources across all 95 counties.

query_basis: Reviewed the current first-party TNSTEP homepage for live PTI designation evidence.

samples.evidence_snippet: TNSTEP is a statewide non-profit that serves as Tennessee's only Parent Training and Information Center.

query_basis: Reviewed the current first-party Help4TN homepage and senior legal helpline page for live statewide legal-aid evidence.

samples.evidence_snippet: Find free legal help and social services. A program of Tennessee Alliance for Legal Services.
Our attorneys offer confidential legal advice and information to all persons aged 60 and above regardless of your income or assets.

query_basis: Reviewed the current official Tennessee Treasury ABLE TN page for first-party state ABLE evidence.

samples.evidence_snippet: ABLE TN is a savings program designed to help Tennesseans with disabilities set aside money to pay for future qualified expenses.

query_basis: Reviewed the current official TennCare eligibility reference guide for Tennessee's preserved SSI eligibility crossover.

samples.evidence_snippet: SSI (Supplemental Security Income). Active: Low-income aged, blind, or disabled recipients of federal SSI cash payments as determined by the SSA.

query_basis: Reviewed the current official Tennessee Family Assistance county office locator for public county-level local office routing.

samples.evidence_snippet: The Family Assistance county office locator preserves a county office workbook, a Select a County menu, and county-specific office cards with phone and fax routing.
